title: amsinckia douglasiana var. campestris
intro: Amsinckia douglasiana var. campestris, also known as Douglas' fiddleneck or Western fiddleneck, is a variety of the Amsinckia douglasiana plant, a flowering annual in the borage family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and antispasmodic properties, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Amsinckia douglasiana var. campestris include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and acting as a natural expectorant to help clear mucus and phlegm from the lungs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to soothe respiratory issues and promote overall health.
